positive: A vintage-style illustration of a futuristic diner scene at sunset. Neon signs advertise fictional goods, chrome details reflect pink and cyan glows, and the art has a distinct 1980s synthwave/vaporwave aesthetic. Grainy texture, synthwave grid background, retro sci-fi poster art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, modern realism, natural sunlight, clean digital art
